artworks.prompt: Concept art depicting a solitary astronaut adrift in the vast cosmic ocean, their visor reflecting nebulae of deep blues and purples. Bioluminescent flora, like ethereal deep-sea creatures, drift past the ship, casting a melancholic, introspective glow on the scene. The composition evokes a profound sense of wonder and isolation against the silent, star-dusted expanse of the universe.

A colossal学生在宏伟的圆形大厅中仰望，面前漂浮着发光的全息星图和数据流，周围环绕着悬浮的智能书卷和发光的神经网络连接，巨型透明穹顶天花投射出soft diffused daylight，整个空间充满cool blues and purples的科技光芒，学生们眼中闪烁着顿悟的光芒，digital mentorship portals在墙上闪烁，concept art风格，powerful and monumental氛围打造史诗般的学习圣殿视觉效果

A photorealistic vista of a futuristic quantum computing facility perched on a desolate arctic cliff under the melancholic glow of the aurora borealis, where ethereal waves of soft pastel hues—icy blues, pale violets, mint greens, and subtle lavenders—dance across the sky, casting reflective shimmer on vast arrays of suspended qubits that pulse like entangled stars forming probabilistic circuits and decohering nebulae. In the foreground, a solitary figure in a sleek white coat gazes pensively at holographic displays of superpositioned data streams morphing into ghostly, boundary-less human forms, evoking the reflective uncertainty of tomorrow's world. Intricate details reveal frost-kissed superconducting coils, flickering quantum gates amid swirling snow, and distant cosmic horizons blending micro and macro scales in award-winning hyper-realism.
